screen.instructionText: Please select a photo and press the confirm button. By doing so, the portrait rights of the selected photo will be purchased.

container.notInMarket: You are not in any market
container.joinMarketFirst: Please join a market first to participate in photo trading.

purchaseDialog.title: Purchase Photo License
purchaseDialog.licenseDescription: Resale allowed during the active period only.

successDialog.title: Purchase Successful
successDialog.message: Your photo portrait is now being exposed to 4 other users and is currently on sale. You can check the result shortly on the Result page.

messages.slotIdMissing: Slot ID is missing. Please select a photo.
